experiments.title: Quickstart CTA above fold
experiments.hypothesis: Putting a copy-paste install + start block above fold increases install-to-start conversion.

experiments.title: Wizard copy simplification
experiments.hypothesis: Reducing onboarding text in start wizard reduces first-command drop-off.

experiments.title: Preset guidance in quickstart
experiments.hypothesis: Recommending project presets in quickstart improves week-1 retention.
